content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – Model for Clause 2.1(c) (Sharing with Employees)
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_7_nda_5

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties to the Agreement
type Party = { name: string }

@ Information that is designated as Confidential
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    is_confidential: bool          # true for all information covered by the NDA
    source_party: Party             # party that originated the information
    purpose: string                # purpose of the disclosure (Clause 1.1)
}

@ Employees, agents, etc. of a receiving party who may need to know the data
type Employee = {
    needs_to_know: bool            # true if the employee must access the data for the Purpose
    bound_by_confidentiality: bool # true if the employee is contractually obliged not to disclose
    employer: Party                # the party that employs the employee
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The party that receives Confidential Information (the “Recipient”)
entity recipient: Party

@ The party that discloses Confidential Information (the “Discloser”)
entity discloser: Party

@ A piece of Confidential Information exchanged under the Agreement
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

@ An employee of the recipient who may be granted access
entity employee: Employee

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1(c) – The Recipient may disclose Confidential Information to its
@ employees, agents, etc. provided they need to know it and are bound
@ by confidentiality obligations.
rule P share_confidential_with_employee:
    (employee.employer = recipient) and
    employee.needs_to_know and
    employee.bound_by_confidentiality and
    confidential_info.is_confidential always

@ Clause 2.1(b) – The Recipient must not copy or reproduce Confidential
@ Information except as reasonably necessary for the Purpose.
rule O prohibit_unnecessary_copy:
    not (confidential_info.is_confidential and
         (confidential_info.source_party = discloser) and
         (confidential_info.purpose != "Purpose")) always

@ Clause 3 – Return of Confidential Information after the Purpose is completed.
rule O return_on_completion:
    (confidential_info.is_confidential) implies
    (confidential_info.purpose = "Purpose") eventually

@ Clause 4.6 – Compliance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
rule O comply_pdp_act:
    true always   # placeholder – compliance is assumed external to the model
```
